mapper.select:
SELECT t1.NAME, t1.phone, t1.craft, t1.id, IFNULL( t2.dayManHour, 0 ) dayManHour, IFNULL( t1.living_expenses, 0 ) livingExpenses, IFNULL( t3.lendMoney, 0 ) lendMoney, IFNULL(( t1.per_diem * t2.dayManHour ), 0 ) wage,( IFNULL( t1.per_diem * t2.dayManHour, 0 ) - IFNULL( t1.living_expenses, 0 ) - IFNULL( t3.lendMoney, 0 ) ) wagePayable FROM sys_worker_user t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sum( man_hour ) dayManHour, user_id FROM sys_accounts WHERE examine_state = 2 GROUP BY user_id ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sum( lend_money ) lendMoney, worker_user_id FROM sys_worker_user_view GROUP BY worker_user_id ) t3 ON t1.id = t3.worker_user_id
WHERE t1.id = ${userId}

SELECT t1.NAME, t1.phone, t1.craft, t1.id, IFNULL( t2.dayManHour, 0 ) dayManHour, IFNULL( t1.living_expenses, 0 ) livingExpenses, IFNULL( t3.lendMoney, 0 ) lendMoney, IFNULL(( t1.per_diem * t2.dayManHour ), 0 ) wage,( IFNULL( t1.per_diem * t2.dayManHour, 0 ) - IFNULL( t1.living_expenses, 0 ) - IFNULL( t3.lendMoney, 0 ) ) wagePayable FROM sys_worker_user t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sum( man_hour ) dayManHour, user_id FROM sys_accounts WHERE examine_state = 2 GROUP BY user_id ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sum( lend_money ) lendMoney, worker_user_id FROM sys_worker_user_view GROUP BY worker_user_id ) t3 ON t1.id = t3.worker_user_id

SELECT (SELECT sum(t1.man_hour) dayManHour FROM sys_accounts t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} AND t1.examine_state = '2') as dayManHour,
(SELECT sum(t2.lend_money) lendMoney FROM sys_worker_user_view t2 WHERE t2.worker_user_id = #{userId}) as lendMoney
SELECT * FROM sys_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND examine_state = '2'

SELECT t1.living_expenses, t1.lend_money, t1.create_time, t1.remark, t2.name as name FROM sys_worker_user_view t1 left join sys_worker_user t2 on t2.id = #{userId}
WHERE worker_user_id = #{userId}
